name: Email & Collaboration
description: Microsoft 365, Exchange, Teams, and collaboration platforms — mail flow, audit logging, and DLP events.
quickTip: Configure Splunk Add-on for Microsoft 365 with Management Activity API for audit events.

subcategories.name: Microsoft 365 / Exchange
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Office 365 (`Splunk_TA_MS_O365`), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Exchange.

subcategories.name: Unified Communications
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco UCM TA, Webex TA, custom CDR/CMR inputs for voice platforms.

subcategories.name: Mail Transport & Relay Infrastructure
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Postfix, Sendmail, Microsoft Exchange, Cisco Email Security Appliance (ESA), generic SMTP/MTA logs

subcategories.name: Video Conferencing & Collaboration Analytics
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Connect for Zoom, `ta_cisco_webex_add_on_for_splunk` (Webex TA), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Cloud Services / Microsoft 365 Add-on for Teams meeting quality.
